content: Hi, I'm Jamie and I'm an Architect at a sustainable design firm. I just got back from a trip to Costa Rica and I'm still on a high from all the amazing experiences I had.
Welcome back, Jamie! Costa Rica is an incredible country. What were some of your favorite experiences from your trip?
Definitely the hiking in the cloud forests and trying all the local foods, like gallo pinto. I also visited my friend, Carlos, in San Jose and we had a blast exploring the city together.
That sounds amazing! I've heard great things about the cloud forests. Did you try any new outdoor activities while you were traveling?

Actually, yes! I tried triathlon training for the first time in a small town in rural Costa Rica. It was such a unique experience and I ended up buying a new bike to try it out back home in Pittsburgh.
That's so cool! I've never met anyone who's into triathlon training before. Are you planning on doing any more hiking or triathlon training trips in the near future?
Yes, I'm actually planning a trip to the Grand Canyon with my roommates to do some hiking and camping. We're thinking of going in November, depending on our schedules.
The Grand Canyon is a beautiful place. Have you and your roommates traveled together before?
Yes, we've taken a few trips together, including a road trip out to Chicago last year. We had a blast and I'm sure we'll have a great time on this trip too.
That sounds like a lot of fun. What do you like to do to relax and unwind after a long day of work on your architectural projects?
I actually really enjoy painting and salsa dancing in my spare time. It's a great way to relieve stress and be creative.
That's really cool! I wouldn't have guessed that you're into painting and salsa dancing. Do you have any favorite artists or styles that you like to paint?
Yeah, I'm actually a big fan of abstract art and I love painting with vibrant colors. I'm also really into vintage cars and I love going on drives and exploring new places.
That sounds like a lot of fun! I'm sure you'll have a great time on your next trip and exploring new places. It was great chatting with you about your travels and hobbies.
Thanks, I will! It was great talking to you too. I'm looking forward to my next adventure and trying out some new things.
You're welcome! It was a pleasure chatting with you. Have a great day and happy travels!
You too, thanks again for the chat! I'm off to plan my next trip and work on some new projects.
